description_long: This sculpture depicts a crowned figure, possibly a queen or a saint, standing upright on a decorative pedestal. The figure is draped in flowing robes with subtle folds and appears to be holding an object or gesture close to the chest. The crown is ornate and detailed, adding a regal or religious connotation to the piece. The surface shows signs of weathering and faint reddish-brown stains, suggesting age or exposure to the elements. The back of the sculpture is less detailed, with the robe's folds continuing around the figure. The base is solid and geometric, providing stability and a sense of permanence.
description: A weathered stone sculpture of a crowned, robed figure standing on a decorative pedestal, with detailed front features and a solid base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the crowned figure's face, detailed robes, and the object or gesture held at the chest.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the robes and the profile of the crown, with less detail visible on the face.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the robe and the crown, with minimal detail and a smooth surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the draping of the robe and the side profile of the head and crown.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
